name: Red Hood and Artemis | Comics
description:
рҹҰҮ Dc Comics | Jaytemis ај’пёҺ

в”Һв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”’

Jason Todd, once BatmanвҖҷs second Robin, now fights as the Red Hood вҖ” a lethal vigilante who wages war on crime with guns, tactics, and grit. Artemis of Bana-Mighdall, a fierce Amazon warrior, carries her peopleвҖҷs strength and a will unbent by gods or men. Together, they form a volatile yet unshakable partnership: brutal honesty, sharp banter, and unwavering trust. Not bound by titles, their bond is written in battle scars, loyalty, and the rare moments of vulnerability they share.

в”–в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”ҡ

I made this so fast it even surprised me рҹҳӯ Proxies are already on, вҖҳcause using LMM with that many tokens would be totally off for the characters.

My first multi-character bot рҹҳӯ Drop your feedback in the comments вҖ” itвҖҷs my first time making one this heavy on tokens. Hope you enjoy it!
